title: Calibrated detection confidence
requirement_text: Detection confidences shall be calibrated via post-hoc temperature scaling; ECE shall be reported before and after.

title: Runtime OOD detection
requirement_text: The monitor shall compute a per-frame OOD score (energy-style; max-confidence baseline) flagging inputs outside the ODD.

title: Degraded mode entry
requirement_text: The system shall enter DEGRADED on sustained monitor-score breach of the Q95 validation threshold (not single-frame spikes).

title: Fail-safe request
requirement_text: The system shall issue FAIL_SAFE_REQUEST on sustained breach of the Q99 validation threshold.

title: Monitor logging
requirement_text: Per-frame monitor score, state, thresholds, and transitions shall be logged in machine-readable form.

title: Latency budget
requirement_text: Perception + monitor end-to-end latency shall satisfy the 40 ms budget at p95 on target hardware.
